diff: The signer requirements and considerations applicable to Multisigs classified with a Time-Sensitive or Emergency Operational Classification level, as defined in [A.2.11.1.3.2.1.1.1.2 - Operational Assessment](35224359-76a6-41fe-adc2-6f70a29f3f4a), are as follows:
- Emergency Response Multisigs must maintain 24/7 availability of a number of signers equal to or greater than the Multisig signing threshold.
- Geographic distribution of signers is encouraged for Emergency Response Multisigs where appropriate to support 24/7 operational coverage.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
